title: Extra Emeralds
description: Adds emerald-related items and trades to the game!
body:
# Extra Emeralds

Adds different emerald-related features to the game!

- Emerald tools and armor
- New villager trades

## Installation and requirements
- Fabric API 0.90.7+1.20.2 or later
- Fabric Loader 0.14.23 or later
- Minecraft 1.20.2 or later

To install, place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder. This mod is required on both server and client.

### Hope you enjoy!
